forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KS0416MQYVFSQFZMM2E9VAVX
+- 01KS041QGRRAK92050H09MWM7G
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8380'
+project: plugin-tsonly
+title: Migrate the 6 committed plugin bundles to TS-only
+---
+## What
+
+Convert every committed plugin bundle in the repo from the `plugin.json` + `entry.ts` layout to TS-only: `index.ts`, no manifest, `name`/`version` as class props.
+
+The six bundles:
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-plugin/examples/plugins/kanban-tasks/`
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-plugin/examples/plugins/file-notes/`
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-plugin/examples/plugins/cli-echo/`
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-plugin/examples/plugins/multi-module/`
+- `builtin/plugins/kanban-builtin-probe/`
+- `test/builtin/plugins/builtin-probe/`
+
+For each bundle:
+- delete `plugin.json`;
+- rename `entry.ts` ŌåÆ `index.ts`;
+- in the `Plugin` subclass, set `name` and `version` props (from task 2), carrying over the values that were in the deleted manifest;
+- `multi-module` keeps its sibling `board-helpers.ts` ŌĆö only the entry filename changes; update the `./board-helpers.ts` import only if needed (it is a sibling, so the relative specifier is unchanged).
+- `cli-echo` keeps the `__CLI_ECHO_COMMAND__` placeholder token ŌĆö it now lives in `index.ts`.
+
+Also:
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-plugin/examples/plugins/README.md` ŌĆö rewrite the bundle-layout / manifest section: a bundle is a directory containing `index.ts` (entry by convention); `name`/`version` are `Plugin` class props; the directory name is the plugin's identity; there is no `plugin.json`, no `id`, no `entry` field, no `provides`. Keep the per-example index/sections accurate.
+- Fix any stale `plugin.json` / `entry.ts` references in the example-related test files that name the committed bundles: `tests/example_plugins_e2e.rs`, `tests/kanban_tasks_e2e.rs`, `tests/file_notes_e2e.rs`, `tests/cli_echo_e2e.rs`, `tests/multi_module_e2e.rs`, `tests/example_layering_e2e.rs`, and `tests/support/mod.rs` (doc comments / path literals referring to `entry.ts`). Do NOT touch tests that write their own inline `plugin.json` ŌĆö those are separate tasks.
+
+Discovery (task 1) already loads manifest-less `index.ts` bundles, so once migrated these bundles load through the existing example e2e tests with no test-logic change.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] No `plugin.json` file remains under any of the six bundles; each bundle has an `index.ts` (and `entry.ts` is gone).
+- [ ] Each example/probe plugin sets `name` and `version` on its `Plugin` subclass.
+- [ ] `examples/plugins/README.md` documents the TS-only model with no stale `plugin.json`/`id`/`entry`/`provides` references.
+- [ ] No stale `entry.ts`/`plugin.json` references remain in the six example-related test files or `tests/support/mod.rs`.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-plugin --test example_plugins_e2e --test kanban_tasks_e2e --test file_notes_e2e --test cli_echo_e2e --test multi_module_e2e --test example_layering_e2e` ŌĆö all pass against the migrated bundles.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p kanban-app` ŌĆö passes (the kanban app embeds `builtin/plugins/kanban-builtin-probe`; confirm it still loads).
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-plugin` ŌĆö full crate green.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` ŌĆö the example e2e tests are the regression net; run them red/green around the migration.
\ No newline at end of file
